name: SILKEN KING
title: LONG LIVE

abilities.name: Coral Carapace
abilities.text: This model's Shielded tokens reduce damage by 2 instead of 1.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Royal Escort
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does, it and up to two allies within (X) 8" may move up to 5".

actions.name: Sacrificial Dagger
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this attack receives, infuse a (c).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Lost to the Deep
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, the target must discard a random card, if able.

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

triggers.name: Shameful Disfigurement
triggers.text: Move the target up to 4" and then make a Scheme marker in base contact with it.

actions.name: Storm Surge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. The target moves up to its Sp toward a Scheme marker in its LoS.

triggers.name: Blood in the Water
triggers.text: The target declares the Charge action.

triggers.name: Cleansing Waters
triggers.text: Remove one marker the target moved through.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='LONG LIVE' back='Long Live'
extraction_notes: Fortitude icon confirmed on Resilient ability
